Our AI calls every new lead in under 30 seconds — automatically, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. While you sleep, we close.

pain_section.heading_html:
You're losing clients
you already paid for
pain_section.description_text: Every lead you generate costs money. When nobody answers fast enough, that investment walks straight to your competitor.

bad_items.title: Lead calls at 7pm on a Friday
bad_items.body: You're done for the day. They leave a voicemail. By Monday they've signed with someone else.

bad_items.title: 80% drop in contact rate after 5 minutes
bad_items.body: Studies show lead quality drops dramatically with every minute you wait to respond.

bad_items.title: $15,000+ walking out the door
bad_items.body: Each missed call in real estate, law, or lending represents thousands in lost revenue — every single time.

bad_items.title: You're manually chasing every lead
bad_items.body: Calling back, following up, hoping they haven't moved on. It's exhausting and ineffective.

good_items.title: Every lead called back in under 30 seconds
good_items.body: Automatically. Day or night. Weekend or public holiday. Your AI never clocks off.

good_items.title: Appointments booked while you sleep
good_items.body: The AI qualifies the lead, answers their questions, and books them straight into your calendar.

good_items.title: 391% higher conversion rate
good_items.body: Businesses that respond within 60 seconds close at nearly 4x the rate of those that wait an hour.

good_items.title: You're always first to answer
good_items.body: In a market where the first call wins the client — you win. Every time.

how_it_works.description_text: We handle everything from setup to ongoing support. You just take the calls that are already booked.

steps.title: Book your free demo
steps.body: 10 minutes. We show you the system live and answer every question you have — no sales pressure.

steps.title: We build your system
steps.body: We set up your AI voice agent and website, configured specifically for your industry and business.

steps.title: Leads get called instantly
steps.body: Every new lead is contacted within 30 seconds, qualified, and booked into your calendar automatically.

steps.title: You close more clients
steps.body: Show up to pre-qualified booked appointments. No chasing. No missed calls. Just more business.

who_its_for.heading_html:
Built for professionals
where speed means money

cards.title: Real Estate Agents
cards.body: In real estate, the agent who calls first gets the listing. Our AI makes sure that's always you — whether it's 9am or 11pm Sunday.
cards.stat_label: average annual commission recovered from missed leads

cards.title: Mortgage Brokers
cards.body: Borrowers compare multiple brokers simultaneously. Being first to call isn't just an advantage — it's the entire game. We make you first. Every time.

cards.title: Lawyers & Law Firms
cards.body: Legal clients are emotional and urgent. When they can't reach you immediately, they call the next firm on Google. Our AI makes sure they reach you first.

book_demo.description_text: Watch the AI call a real lead in real time. No slides. No pitch deck. Just the system working exactly as it will for your business.
book_demo.footer_note_text: No obligation. No credit card. The demo is free — the missed calls aren't.

faq.heading_html:
Questions we get asked
before every demo

items.question: How quickly does the AI respond to a new lead?
items.answer: Under 30 seconds from the moment a lead submits their details on your website. This applies 24 hours a day, 7 days a week including weekends and public holidays.

items.question: Does it sound like a robot?
items.answer: No. Our AI voice agents are trained to have natural, conversational interactions. Most leads don't realise they're speaking with an AI — they simply experience a fast, professional response.

items.question: How long does setup take?
items.answer: We have most clients live within 7 days. We handle all the technical setup, configuration, and testing — you don't need any tech knowledge.

items.question: What does it cost?
items.answer: Pricing is discussed during your free demo once we understand your business and call volume. Most clients find the system pays for itself within the first one or two recovered leads.

items.question: Do I need a new website?
items.answer: Not necessarily. The AI can integrate with your existing site. However, we also build high-converting websites designed to generate more leads in the first place — ask us about this during your demo.

items.question: Is there a lock-in contract?
items.answer: No lock-in contracts. We're confident the results speak for themselves — you stay because it works, not because you're obligated to.

final_cta.heading_html:
Your competitors are
already faster than you.
final_cta.description_text: Every day without this system is another day of missed calls, lost clients, and revenue walking to whoever answers first.
final_cta.note_text: No obligation. No credit card. The demo is free — the missed calls aren't.
